name: chrome-extension-bingeflix
excerpt: A simple Google-Chrome extension that scans for buttons when watching Netflix and automatically presses them.
description: BingeFlix is a Google Chrome extension designed to automatically press the 'Skip Intro' and 'Next Episode' buttons which appear whilst watching Netflix, allowing you to binge-watch uninterrupted. Additionally, it has a simple settings menu, where you can control which buttons the plugin should automatically press.
